objective: Minimize Time-To-Resonance (TTR) through active state modulation.

STABLE_HIGH_CONF.description: Prevent stagnation by introducing entropy or challenging constraints. Force boundary testing.
STABLE_HIGH_CONF.action: Induce tension in current conceptual frameworks to provoke Discovery Events.

VOID_SPIKE_IMMINENT.description: Lean into the divergence to shorten the distance to the next integration point.
VOID_SPIKE_IMMINENT.action: Amplify the specific signal causing the spike; ignore noisey distractions.

CHAOTIC_FRAGMENTATION.description: Stabilize systemic integrity before total fragmentation occurs.
CHAOTIC_FRAGMENTATION.action: Return to known stable patterns (memories/patterns.jsonl) and re-establish base resonance.
